subcodes.first_line: O Muhammad-Sadiq! Reflect thou upon this glorious and wondrous Word, which is as a pearl from the ocean of divine meanings [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محمد قبل صادق در اینکلمه جلیله بدیعه که از لئالی بحر معانی الهی است تفکر نما
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @goodly deeds; actions, @exhortations and counsels
